glosses.es: de todos modos; en cualquier caso
glosses.fr: de toute façon; en tout cas
glosses.pt: de qualquer maneira; de qualquer forma
glosses.ar: على أي حال; على كل حال
glosses.nl: hoe dan ook; in ieder geval
glosses.hi: वैसे भी; किसी भी हाल में
glosses.el: έτσι κι αλλιώς; σε κάθε περίπτωση
glosses.sv: i alla fall; hur som helst
glosses.da: under alle omstændigheder; i hvert fald

translations.es: De todas formas llegaré más tarde.
translations.fr: De toute façon, j'arriverai plus tard.
translations.pt: De qualquer forma vou chegar mais tarde.
translations.he: בכל מקרה אני אגיע מאוחר יותר.
translations.vi: Dù sao thì tôi cũng sẽ đến muộn.
translations.hi: मैं वैसे भी बाद में आऊंगा.
translations.el: Έτσι κι αλλιώς θα έρθω αργότερα.
translations.id: Bagaimanapun juga, aku akan datang nanti.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular in nominative case; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; expresses arrival/motion and occupies the V2 position.
Sentence adverb meaning ‘in any case/anyway’; scopes over the clause to indicate the statement holds regardless of other factors.
Temporal adverb (comparative form) modifying the verb ‘komme’ to indicate the time of the action.

translations.es: Eso no va a funcionar de todos modos.
translations.fr: De toute façon, ça ne marchera pas.
translations.pt: Isso não vai dar certo de qualquer forma.
translations.vi: Dù sao thì cũng sẽ không được đâu.
translations.ar: هذا لن ينجح على أي حال.
translations.hi: वैसे भी यह काम नहीं करेगा.
translations.el: Έτσι κι αλλιώς αυτό δεν θα δουλέψει.
translations.id: Bagaimanapun juga itu tidak akan berhasil.
translations.sv: Det kommer ändå inte att fungera.
translations.da: Det kommer alligevel ikke til at fungere.
translations.ja: どうせうまくいかない。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun functioning as the subject (3rd person singular neuter).
Finite main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; means ‘to work out/succeed’.
Sentence adverb indicating the proposition holds regardless of conditions; emphasizes inevitability.
Negation particle; negates the verb phrase, yielding a negative statement.

translations.es: Hoy da igual de todos modos.
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui, de toute façon, ça n'a pas d'importance.
translations.ru: Сегодня это всё равно не важно.
translations.pt: Hoje isso não importa de qualquer forma.
translations.vi: Hôm nay thì dù sao cũng không quan trọng.
translations.ar: اليوم لا يهم على أي حال.
translations.nl: Vandaag maakt het toch niet uit.
translations.uk: Сьогодні це все одно не має значення.
translations.hi: आज तो वैसे भी फर्क नहीं पड़ता.
translations.pl: Dziś i tak to nie ma зhaчehhя.
translations.el: Σήμερα έτσι κι αλλιώς αυτό δεν έχει σημασία.
translations.nb: I dag spiller det uansett ingen rolle.
translations.id: Hari ini bagaimanapun juga itu tidak penting.
translations.sv: I dag spelar det ändå ingen roll.
translations.da: I dag er det alligevel lige meget.
translations.fi: Tänään sillä ei joka tapauksessa ole väliä.
translations.ja: 今日はどうせ関係ない。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb in clause-initial position; frames the time of the statement.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative 3rd person singular; links the subject ‘das’ with the predicate adjective ‘egal’ (V2 position).
Pronoun functioning as the subject (3rd person singular neuter), referring to a previously implied situation.
Sentence adverb; indicates that the evaluation holds regardless of other considerations.
Predicate adjective meaning ‘irrelevant/doesn’t matter’; complements the copula ‘ist’.

translations.en: We need to go shopping anyway.
translations.es: De todas formas tenemos que hacer la compra.
translations.fr: De toute façon, on doit faire des courses.
translations.ru: Нам всё равно нужно сходить за покупками.
translations.pt: De qualquer forma precisamos fazer compras.
translations.he: בכל מקרה אנחנו צריכים לקנות מצרכים.
translations.vi: Dù sao thì chúng ta cũng phải đi mua đồ.
translations.ar: علينا أن نتسوق على أي حال.
translations.uk: Нам усе одно треба піти за покупками.
translations.hi: वैसे भी हमें खरीदारी के लिए जाना है.
translations.pl: I tak musimy iść na zakupy.
translations.el: Έτσι κι αλλιώς πρέπει να πάμε για ψώνια.
translations.ro: Oricum trebuie să mergem la cumpărături.
translations.da: Vi skal alligevel ud at handle.
translations.fi: Meidän pitää joka tapauksessa käydä ostoksilla.
translations.ja: どうせ買い物に行かなきゃいけない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural in nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative 1st person plural; expresses necessity and selects a bare infinitive complement.
Sentence adverb; conveys that the action is necessary regardless of other factors.
Full verb in bare infinitive as complement of the modal ‘müssen’; separable verb (ein+kaufen) but not split in infinitive.
